script:
set +e
echo '=== aixa errors (claude lines, last 10) ==='
grep -E 'claude rc=|Not logged in|claude timeout' /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10

grep -E 'claude rc=|Not logged in|claude timeout' /home/azureuser/.alejandro-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10
echo '=== cameron errors ==='
grep -E 'claude rc=|Not logged in|claude timeout' /home/azureuser/.cameron-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10
echo '=== jesus-reyes errors ==='
grep -E 'claude rc=|Not logged in|claude timeout' /home/azureuser/.jesus-reyes-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10
echo '=== ashley errors ==='
grep -E 'claude rc=|Not logged in|claude timeout' /home/azureuser/.ashley-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10
echo '===END==='
